sub_modules.fp_operand_classify: Extracts sign, exponent, and mantissa fields and classifies operands as zero, infinity, NaN, or denormal.
sub_modules.fp_special_cases: Handles IEEE-style special cases covered by the testbench, including NaN propagation, infinity, infinity times zero invalid, and zero results.
sub_modules.fp_significand_prepare: Builds hidden-bit significands and computes the bias-adjusted base exponent for multiplication.
sub_modules.fp_normalize_round: Normalizes the significand product, applies rounding mode control, flushes underflow to zero, and detects overflow.
